creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

> >Synopsis:  x11-fm/tkdesk port has nonobvious dependency on
> >devel/gmake-3.77

> tkdesk requires gmake to build, but description in
> <URL:http://www.freebsd.org/ports/x11-fm.html> fails to mention this.

Ummmm.. what?

peloton > more /usr/ports/x11-fm/tkdesk/Makefile

# New ports collection makefile for:    tkdesk
# Version required:     1.0
# Date created:         30 Jul 1996
# Whom:                 shanee@rabbit.augusta.de
#
# $Id: Makefile,v 1.11 1998/10/10 03:22:20 steve Exp $
#

DISTNAME=       tkdesk-1.1

-snip-

USE_GMAKE=      YES


That's a pretty darn clear indicator that you need gmake. 

Brett
